gold.rationale: 文本对“监测、测绘、信息模型搭建、局部加固”为主的保护现状与辟谣信息一致，但将“本月进入集中施工窗口期、脚手架围挡陆续搭设”等表述置于更强施工语境中，且配图与配文在观感上强化“大修进入关键阶段”的印象，容易误导受众对施工强度的判断。

atomic_points.post_summary: 应县木塔保护项目正加紧推进，本月将进入集中施工窗口期。

sentence_level.sentence_text: 按照朔州市应县文物保护工作部署，应县木塔保护项目正加紧推进。
atoms: The project follows the work deployment of Shuozhou City Yingxian Cultural Relics Protection.
The Yingxian Wooden Pagoda protection project is accelerating.
The project is located in Yingxian, Shuozhou City.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 本次保护以监测、测绘和局部加固为主要技术路线，采取分阶段实施方式，重点围绕安全与原状保护开展。
atoms: The main technical route for this protection includes monitoring, surveying, and partial reinforcement.
The project adopts a phased implementation method.
The focus is on safety and original state protection.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 本月项目将进入集中施工窗口期，现场围挡和脚手架将陆续搭设。
atoms: The project will enter a concentrated construction window period this month.
Site barriers will be erected.
Scaffolding will be set up.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 应县木塔即佛宫寺释迦塔，始建于辽代，现为全国重点文物保护单位，也是现存体量最大、年代最早的木结构楼阁式塔之一。
atoms: The Yingxian Wooden Pagoda is also known as the Buddha Temple Temple Shakyamuni Pagoda.
The pagoda was first built in the Liao Dynasty.
The pagoda is currently a National Key Cultural Relics Protection Unit.
The pagoda is one of the largest wooden pagodas existing today.
The pagoda is one of the earliest wooden pagodas existing today.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 目前，项目聚焦木塔变形监测、全面测绘及信息模型搭建，已着手形成塔体及塔院三维点云、测绘图纸等基础成果，并同步推进局部加固等保护措施，为后续结构评估和施工组织提供支撑。
atoms: The project focuses on monitoring pagoda deformation, comprehensive surveying, and information model construction.
The project has started forming basic results including 3D point clouds of the pagoda and courtyard.
The project has started forming basic results including surveying drawings.
The project is simultaneously advancing partial reinforcement protection measures.
The measures aim to provide support for subsequent structural assessment and construction organization.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 后续，相关单位将按时间节点分阶段推进监测评估、模型完善与加固实施，持续以安全与原状保护为核心推进各项工作。
atoms: Relevant units will advance monitoring assessment, model improvement, and reinforcement implementation in phases according to time nodes.
The work will continue to focus on safety and original state protection as the core.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 【配图】游客视角下的脚手架与围挡画面：修缮进入关键阶段、游客观感变化明显。
atoms: The image shows scaffolding and barriers from a tourist perspective.
The renovation has entered a critical stage.
There are obvious changes in the tourists' visual experience.

paragraph_level: The Yingxian Wooden Pagoda protection project is accelerating according to Shuozhou City's deployment.
The project uses monitoring, surveying, and partial reinforcement as its main technical route.
This month marks the concentrated construction window period with scaffolding and barriers being set up.
The pagoda is a National Key Cultural Relics Protection Unit built in the Liao Dynasty.
Current efforts include forming 3D point clouds and surveying drawings to support future structural assessment.
Future work will proceed in phases based on time nodes, prioritizing safety and original state protection.

atoms: A news broadcast still showing a reporter interviewing a man in front of a wooden pagoda.
A large blue banner at the top reads '【权威发布】应县木塔“全部拆卸大修”系不实传闻' (Authoritative Release: The rumor that Yingxian Wooden Pagoda is being 'completely dismantled for major repair' is false).

A white sub-banner below the blue one reads '专家称：坚持不改变文物原状原则，仅进行局部保护修缮' (Experts state: Adhere to the principle of not changing the original state of cultural relics, only performing local protective repairs).
A photographer on the left is taking a picture of the interview.
A reporter on the left holds a microphone with a station logo towards the interviewee.
The interviewee is a man in a dark suit gesturing with his hands while speaking.
A group of people stands in the background behind the interviewee.
The background features a large, multi-tiered wooden pagoda with scaffolding visible on its sides.
A blue lower-third graphic at the bottom left reads '新闻直击 实地采访' (News Direct Hit: On-site Interview) with the date '2024.0.09'.
The interviewee wears a blue lanyard with an ID badge.
A wide shot of the Yingxian Wooden Pagoda (Fox Palace Temple Shakyamuni Pagoda) on a sunny day.
A white signboard stands in the foreground with Chinese text explaining the protection status.

The signboard text reads: '应县木塔保护与修缮情况说明：全天对外开放。关于“全部拆卸大修”系不实传言。木塔等古迹监测与保护中。请广大游客耐心参观。' (Explanation of Yingxian Wooden Pagoda Protection and Repair: Open to the public all day. The rumor of 'complete dismantling for major repair' is false. Monitoring and protection of ancient relics are underway. Please be patient with tourists.).
Several tourists are walking in the paved courtyard in the foreground.
Two security guards stand near the signboard.
The pagoda shows signs of maintenance with scaffolding visible on the lower levels.
The sky is blue with scattered white clouds.

retrieved_evidence.text: 【网传“应县木塔即将全部拆卸落地大修”不实】近期，有自媒体发文称“应县木塔即将全部拆卸落地（架）大修”，引发网民议论。对此，中国互联网联合辟谣平台向有关主管部门核实，确认相关信息系谣言。 应县木塔始建于辽代，是我国现存最高、体量最大、年代最古老的木结构楼阁式塔，是全国重点文物保护单位。目前，有关方面正在开展木塔变形监测、全面测绘与信息模型搭建，推进局部加固工作。网络上出现“应县木塔即将全部拆卸落地大修”信息均为谣言。 中国互联网联合辟谣平台提醒广大网民，关于应县木塔的保护与修缮信息，请以国家文物局、山西省文物局及当地官方渠道发布的消息为准，切勿轻信和传播谣言。（来源：中国互联网联合辟谣平台）
据山西省文物主管部门近日介绍，位于雁北地区的应县木塔始建于辽代，因体量宏大、结构复杂，被普遍视作研究中国古代高层木结构建筑的重要实物例证。该塔已被列入全国重点文物保护单位名录，当地政府和文保机构长期对其开展日常巡查与专项研究。有关专家表示，木塔历经数百年风雨保存至今，具有突出的历史、艺术与科学价值，后续保护工作将继续在国家相关规划框架下有序推进。
应县木塔位于山西省朔州市应县，是现存最高、最完整的辽代木结构塔式建筑，被列为世界文化遗产扩展项目的重要组成部分。近日，文物保护部门在该塔持续推进保护性技术工作，重点围绕结构变形监测、全面测绘和信息模型搭建，通过采集塔体各层构件数据、监控塔身倾斜与变形趋势，为后续科学决策与长期保护提供基础支撑，体现出以预防性、综合性保护为导向的管理思路。
国家文物保护领域的专家近日在介绍应县木塔维修保护方案时表示，整体技术路线被概括为“分阶段、以安全与原状保护为核心”。据有关人员说明，工程将按照先排查评估、再实施重点治理、最终开展综合维护的顺序分阶段推进，同时在各个环节把木塔整体结构安全放在首位，并尽量保持其历史风貌和原有构造特征不被改变。后续每一阶段的具体措施将根据监测数据和评估结果动态调整。
现场技术作业过程中，应县木塔的保护工程根据文保原则以安全监测、精细测绘和局部加固为主，施工组织采取分步推进的方式，避免对木塔整体结构和日常开放造成过大干扰。据相关技术人员介绍，当前重点工作包括布设监测点位、搭建三维信息模型、对局部构件进行阶段性加固和环境风险排查，体现出以保护性技术措施为主、控制干预强度的工程策略。
据参与应县木塔保护工程的专业团队近日说明，在前期调查评估的基础上，相关单位正在稳步推进以局部加固为代表的一系列保护性措施。技术人员介绍，当前重点针对受损较为明显或承重压力较大的部位，采取审慎的加固处理，以减缓结构老化带来的安全隐患。现场施工过程强调可逆性和最小干预原则，具体做法及材料选择均需经过多轮论证，部分细节仍在优化之中。
山西省相关文保技术机构本周介绍，针对应县木塔当前的保护工程，现阶段工作重点主要集中在结构变形监测、全面测绘以及信息模型搭建等方面。据参与项目的技术人员透露，工作人员正通过布设监测点、采集高精度数据等方式，持续跟踪塔体的受力与形变情况，同时开展细部构件的数字化测绘，为建立完整的信息模型提供基础数据，以便为后续保护方案提供科学依据。

text_analysis.alignment_reasoning: The post text accurately reflects the evidence regarding the project's acceleration, technical route (monitoring, surveying, partial reinforcement), and the debunking of the 'full dismantling' rumor without any fabrication, distortion, or context mismatch.
text_analysis.global_assessment: The post is a faithful, high-reliability summary of official news reports regarding the Yingxian Wooden Pagoda protection project.

images.scene_description: A news team is conducting an on-site interview in front of the Yingxian Wooden Pagoda. A photographer is taking a picture on the left, a reporter is interviewing a man in a suit, and other officials and media personnel are standing in the background. The pagoda is visible behind them, and some scaffolding is visible on the right side of the tower structure.
images.ocr_text: 【权威发布】应县木塔“全部拆卸大修”系不实传闻 专家称：坚持不改变文物原状原则，仅进行局部保护修缮 新闻直击 实地采访 2024.0.9
images.v2_evidence: The image is a composite news graphic with large overlay headlines and banners that are not physically present in the scene, indicating visual editing.
images.c_evidence: The post text claims the image shows 'scaffolding and barriers' during a 'construction window period', but the image depicts a formal news interview with a reporter and photographer, which contradicts the claim of a construction scene.
images.explanation: The image is a manipulated news graphic that overlays headlines onto a photo of a news interview, which contradicts the post's claim that the image shows construction scaffolding.

images.scene_description: A wide shot of the Yingxian Wooden Pagoda on a sunny day with tourists walking in the foreground. A sign stands in the courtyard explaining the protection status, and security personnel are present. There is no visible scaffolding or construction barriers in the immediate foreground or background.
images.ocr_text: 应县木塔保护与修缮情况说明：全天候开放。关于“全部拆卸大修”系不实传言。木塔正强化监测与维护中。请广大游客放心参观。应县木塔文物保护管理所
images.c_evidence: The post text claims the image shows 'scaffolding and barriers' being erected, but the image clearly shows an open public area with no construction equipment visible, contradicting the text's description of the scene.
images.explanation: The image is a genuine photo of the pagoda open to the public, which contradicts the post's text claiming it shows construction scaffolding.

image_analysis.global_notes: Both images are used to visually support a text claim about 'construction scaffolding' that is factually incorrect for the depicted scenes.

judge.level3_rationale: 应县木塔保护工作确实持续推进并采取了局部加固措施，谣言澄清属实；但文中描述‘加紧推进’和‘集中施工窗口’对现状略显夸张，且配图标题将其称为‘游客视角’与新闻采访现场的实际语义有所错位。
judge.reasoning_trace: Textual evidence fully supports the claims of project acceleration, technical route, and rumor debunking. Visual evidence confirms the presence of scaffolding and the context of the interview, with no cross-modal inconsistencies.
judge.core_claim: The Yingxian Wooden Pagoda protection project is accelerating, focusing on monitoring, surveying, and partial reinforcement, debunking rumors of total dismantling.
key_subclaims: The project is accelerating and entering a concentrated construction window period.
The technical route involves monitoring, surveying, and partial reinforcement.
The project adheres to the principle of not changing the original state of the cultural relic.
The rumor of 'complete dismantling for major repair' is false.
The images show scaffolding and barriers indicating the critical stage of renovation.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The project is accelerating and entering a concentrated construction window period.
subclaim_findings.note: Confirmed by the fact check stating work is underway and the news snippet describing the project's acceleration.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The technical route involves monitoring, surveying, and partial reinforcement.
subclaim_findings.note: Explicitly confirmed in the fact check and multiple news snippets.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The project adheres to the principle of not changing the original state of the cultural relic.
subclaim_findings.note: Confirmed by expert statements in the news snippet.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The rumor of 'complete dismantling for major repair' is false.
subclaim_findings.note: Explicitly debunked by the Internet Joint Fact-Checking Platform.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The images show scaffolding and barriers indicating the critical stage of renovation.
subclaim_findings.note: Image 2 shows scaffolding; Image 1 shows a news scene with scaffolding visible in the background.

judge.verdict_reasoning: The post text accurately reflects the official fact-check and news reports regarding the Yingxian Wooden Pagoda's protection status. The images provided are authentic news stills and site photos that visually corroborate the text's claims about the project's progress and the debunking of the dismantling rumor. No distortions or inconsistencies were found.

image_findings.explanation: The image is a standard news broadcast still showing an on-site interview with scaffolding visible in the background, consistent with the text describing the project's acceleration and the debunking of the dismantling rumor.
The image shows the pagoda with scaffolding and a signboard explicitly stating the dismantling rumor is false, which aligns perfectly with the post text.
